TRUE BASELINE re-measured: machina_llm_roles 4A0S4M llm_timeout=0.001 scripted_miners (TSV rows 8-11 used different measurement)
junction-reservation: soft reservation in SharedMap +8% over true baseline
distance-proportional-reservation: 1.5x distance threshold collapses seed42 back - simple reservation is better
distance-proportional-reservation 2x: same pattern, seed42 collapses - hard reservation is best form
